notes: Convert FAQ slot to accordion on contact

content.value:
Contact FAQ

How quickly do you respond?

Most enquiries are reviewed quickly, and we follow up with practical next steps.

Can we book a strategy call first?

Yes. You can start with a short call or a free business audit based on your preference.

What should I prepare before contacting?

Your goals, current setup, and biggest bottleneck are enough to start a useful discussion.
